prompt: Logo wordmark on pure white (#FFFFFF) background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. All text is solid black (#000000) except the period dot at the end which is bright yellow (#FAFA00). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same font, same weight for every single letter. Wide rectangular letterforms with thick strokes and sharp 90-degree corners. The text spans most of the horizontal canvas — this is the large hero version, dominant and powerful. No icon, no symbol. Vector quality, perfectly crisp, flat design on white background.
negative_prompt: black background, dark background, icon, symbol, graphic, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, gray text, different fonts, mixed typefaces, rounded font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge
